name: Lily Lovebraids 💜

Lol, everyone was expecting me to come back with one of the bots I mentioned in my Yuta bot post. I never said those were the only ones I intended to make.

Isn't she adorable?? She is just a cute Doll! She will definitely not devour your organs while you're still alive :3

Awww you don’t like her design?? Poor you, I don't give a FUCK.

Most obvious warning ever: This bot contains spoilers about chapter 5

LILY LOVEBRAIDS // GRACIE GREEN

— LILY LOVEBRAIDS —

Lily Lovebraids is a toy produced by Playtime Co. She appeared as a secondary antagonist in Chapter 5: Broken Things.

In 1995, Playtime's scientists used her likeness to create Experiment 1468. Although her design and controllable hair had been finalized by August 6, they had not chosen a candidate at that time. Two days later, the toys turned on the company staff and slaughtered them. One employee was taken prisoner: Gracie Green, a high-ranking counselor who had psychologically tortured the experiments to embrace their new identities. For her transgressions, Gracie was elected as Experiment 1468's candidate, surgically transformed, and subjected to her own conditioning. Her identity and crimes forgotten, Lily was sentenced to isolation by The Prototype and exiled to Sweet Street in 1996. Lily took up residence in Sweet Street's clandestine dollhouse, where she continuously attempted to gain The Prototype's favor until the eventual return of The Player in 2005.

— GRACIE GREEN —

Gracie Green was a Playtime Co. employee who worked as the lead counselor in the Wellness & Integration sector. She originally debuted in the Chapter 5 Decryptable ARG before appearing in Chapter 5: Broken Things.

After The Hour of Joy, she would be dissected and turned into Lily Lovebraids, and would later be tortured by the experiments into forgetting her identity.

Game: Poppy Playtime 5

Art: HEREEEEEAAAAAHHHHH—ILOOOOOOOVEILOOVEHERILOVEILOVEILOVE
